CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "受付"), "登録申込済", IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "研修通知") && ISBLANK( Interview_Name__c) , "研修・面談を未申込", IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "研修通知") && NOT ISBLANK( Interview_Name__c ) , "研修・面談を申込済", IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "研修省略"), "研修・面談を受講しない", IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "未評価"), "面談評価未登録", IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "ID発行済"), "ユーザID発行済", IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "削除"), "ユーザID削除済", IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "ID失敗"), "ユーザID発行失敗、システム業者に要連絡", "") )))))))
CustomField.label: 状況
